title: FINANCIAL PEACE UNIVERSITY - 211info
text: SALEM ALLIANCE CHURCH FINANCIAL PEACE UNIVERSITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Nine-week course in a faith-based setting that teaches people how to get control of their money, stop struggling to make ends meet, get out of debt, and manage resources. 555 Gaines Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by course Email (503) 581-2129 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 581-2129 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: $99 per person or couple DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Financial Literacy Training Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT NETWORK MATERIAL GOODS - FURNITURE BANK MUTUAL SUPPORT - GRIEF SUPPORT GROUP UTILITIES - THE ROYAL ORDER OF RED SUSPENDERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALEM ALLIANCE CHURCH
